title: Selecting a CMO: A Risk-Based Path
alt: Five-step process for risk-based CMO selection under EU GMP

items.label: Define Requirements
items.desc: Map product, process, regulatory footprint and supply scope first.

items.label: Risk-Based Framework
items.desc: Scale scrutiny to risk per ICH Q9; set weighted criteria.

items.label: Score Candidates
items.desc: Weigh compliance, QMS maturity, data integrity and culture.

items.label: Audit & Agreement
items.desc: On-site audit, then a Chapter 7 quality agreement.

items.label: Manage Lifecycle
items.desc: Re-audit on risk and monitor performance under ICH Q10.
